prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年理科/物理类最低位次约 2458→1824→1933→1751→3292，2021–2024 年整体在 1750–2458 区间波动，2025 年因云南省首次实施新高考（文理分科改为物理类/历史类），位次大幅后移至 3292 名，较 2024 年后移约 1541 名，波动剧烈；该校在云南省理科/物理类招生计划 2021–2025 年分别为 82→82→84→85→86 人，逐年小幅递增；2026 年计划 91 人，较 2025 年扩招约 5.8%，扩招使竞争略有加剧，位次数字趋于增大。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985、211、双一流综合类大学；软科中国大学排名 2026 年约第 13 名（Top20），近年排名稳定在第 11–13 名，学校层次极高；2026 年高考周期声誉评价偏负面（主要涉及学术不端相关舆情），但 2025 年周期评价偏正面；抖音综合热度排名第 29（较热），短视频曝光量处于中上水平；2022 年曾出现多省断档信号（中关注），2023–2024 年断档关注度较低，历史断档对报考心理的滞后影响已基本消化；第五轮学科评估 A- 及以上共 23 个，其中生态学 A+、工商管理 A+、临床医学 A-、计算机科学与技术 A-、数学 A、物理学 A 等，与理科招生专业高度关联，学科实力雄厚。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等专业持续高热推荐，临床医学推荐，与中山大学优势学科方向一致，相关专业报考热度高；云南省 2026 年普通高考总人数约 37.79 万，较 2025 年（历史类+物理类约 28.57 万）大幅增加，按近年比例估算物理类考生约 22.94 万，较 2025 年物理类 17.33 万增加约 32%，竞争显著加剧；2026 年；中山大学位于广东广州，属华南地区顶尖高校，对西南省份云南考生有较强吸引力；该校在云南理科/物理类招生计划约占其全国总计划的较小比例，跨省招生规模稳定。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025 年新高考改革后位次大幅后移的基准、2026 年扩招约 5.8% 使竞争略加剧、云南省物理类考生规模大幅增加约 32% 使竞争显著加剧、学校声誉偏负面可能略降温但抖音热度仍较热、优势学科实力强劲等因素，在 2025 年基准 3292 名基础上预计位次继续后移；预测最低位次约 3487 名，区间 3069–3905 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for science/physics category were approximately 2458→1824→1933→1751→3292. From 2021 to 2024, the overall fluctuation range was 1750–2458. In 2025, due to Yunnan Province implementing the new college entrance examination for the first time (changing from arts/science division to physics/history categories), the ranking significantly dropped to 3292, a shift of about 1541 places compared to 2024, showing drastic fluctuation. The university's enrollment plan for science/physics category in Yunnan Province from 2021 to 2025 was 82→82→84→85→86 students, increasing slightly year by year. The 2026 plan is 91 students, an increase of about 5.8% compared to 2025. The expansion slightly intensifies competition, leading to a trend of increasing ranking numbers.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985, 211, and Double First-Class comprehensive university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranks approximately 13th (Top 20), with stable rankings between 11th and 13th in recent years, indicating a very high university level. During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, the reputation evaluation is somewhat negative (mainly related to academic misconduct public opinion), but in the 2025 cycle, the evaluation was relatively positive. Its comprehensive popularity ranking on Douyin is 29th (relatively popular), with short video exposure at an upper-middle level. In 2022, there were signals of enrollment gaps in multiple provinces (medium attention), but in 2023–2024, attention to enrollment gaps was low, and the lagging impact of historical enrollment gaps on application psychology has been largely absorbed. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, there are 23 disciplines rated A- or above, including Ecology A+, Business Administration A+, Clinical Medicine A-, Computer Science and Technology A-, Mathematics A, Physics A, etc., which are highly related to science enrollment majors, demonstrating strong academic strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering, etc., continue to be highly recommended, and Clinical Medicine is also recommended. These align with Sun Yat-sen University's advantageous disciplines, leading to high application enthusiasm for related majors. In 2026, the total number of candidates for the regular college entrance examination in Yunnan Province is about 377,900, a significant increase compared to 2025 (history category + physics category about 285,700). Estimated by recent proportions, physics category candidates are about 229,400, an increase of about 32% compared to 2025's 173,300 physics category candidates, significantly intensifying competition. In 2026, Sun Yat-sen University is located in Guangzhou, Guangdong, a top university in South China, which has strong appeal to candidates from the southwestern province of Yunnan. The university's enrollment plan for science/physics category in Yunnan accounts for a relatively small proportion of its total national plan, with stable cross-provincial enrollment scale.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant backward shift in rankings after the 2025 new college entrance examination reform as a baseline, the 2026 enrollment expansion of about 5.8% slightly intensifying competition, the substantial increase of about 32% in the number of physics category candidates in Yunnan Province significantly intensifying competition, the somewhat negative university reputation possibly cooling down slightly but still relatively popular on Douyin, and the strong academic strength of advantageous disciplines, it is expected that the ranking will continue to shift backward based on the 2025 baseline of 3292. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 3487, with a range of 3069–3905.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: The predicted ranking is approximately 3487, with a range of 3069–3905. Candidates with rankings within the lower bound of the range (3069) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors (Clinical Medicine Eight-Year Program, Computer Science). Candidates with rankings around the middle of the range (approximately 3487) are advised to primarily consider Tier 2 majors (Mathematics, Electronic Information Engineering, Finance Dual Degree, etc.). Candidates with rankings near the upper bound of the range (3905) are advised to use Tier 3 majors as safety options (Economics, Business Administration), while also attempting Tier 2 majors with lower ranking requirements.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: 2021–2025 minimum rankings for liberal arts/history category approximately 430→445→292→335→400, stable at 430–445 in 2021–2022, significantly advanced to 292 in 2023 (best in recent years), retreated to 335 in 2024, further retreated to 400 in 2025 (history category), showing an overall retreat trend in the past 3 years; the university's enrollment plan for liberal arts/history category in Yunnan Province from 2021 to 2025 is 27→27→25→24→24 students, showing a slight annual reduction; the 2026 plan is 21 students, a 12.5% reduction compared to 2025, which slightly eases competition and tends to decrease ranking numbers.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class comprehensive university; ranked approximately 13th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings (Top20), stable at 11th–13th in recent years, very high university level; reputation evaluation for the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is slightly negative (mainly involving academic misconduct related public opinion), but the 2025 cycle evaluation was slightly positive; Douyin comprehensive popularity ranking 29th (relatively hot), short video exposure at an upper-middle level; there were multi-province cutoff signals in 2022 (medium attention), low attention to cutoffs in 2023–2024, the lagging impact of historical cutoffs on application psychology has been largely absorbed; the fifth round of discipline evaluation has 23 disciplines rated A- or above, including Business Administration A+, Ecology A+, Chinese Language and Literature A, Philosophy A-, Law A-, Sociology A-, etc., highly related to liberal arts enrollment majors, with strong disciplinary strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law differentiation and wait-and-see, Chinese Language/Literature recommended, Teacher Training/Education differentiation and wait-and-see, liberal arts related major popularity diverging; total number of regular college entrance examination takers in Yunnan Province in 2026 is approximately 377,900, significantly increased from about 285,700 in 2025 (history category + physics category), estimated history category candidates about 148,500 based on recent proportions, an increase of about 32% from 112,400 in 2025, competition significantly intensifies; 2026; Sun Yat-sen University is located in Guangzhou, Guangdong, a top university in South China, strongly attractive to candidates from southwestern Yunnan Province; the university's enrollment plan for liberal arts/history category in Yunnan accounts for a relatively small proportion of its national total plan, with stable cross-provincial enrollment scale.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the retreat trend in rankings over the past 3 years, the 12.5% enrollment reduction in 2026 slightly easing competition, the significant increase of about 32% in the number of history category candidates in Yunnan Province significantly intensifying competition, the slightly negative university reputation possibly cooling down but Douyin popularity still relatively hot, strong advantageous disciplines and other factors, the upward push on rankings from the increase in candidate numbers is stronger than the downward pull from enrollment reduction; based on the 2025 baseline of 400, the ranking is expected to retreat slightly; predicted minimum ranking approximately 390, range 340–440.
